author: yaye.work
description: A complete re-vamp of the obsidian's canvas experience. Great for canvas-first, non-linear notetaking workflow. Draw, quickly add new or existing notes, drag to make sections, interactive tables+more - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: yaye.work
manifest.description: A FigJam-style annotation toolbar for Canvas: marker, highlighter, washi tape, eraser, frameless text, cards, sections, and tables.
manifest.name: Canvas Kit

name: Canvas Kit

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
Draw-tool selection fix.

- Drawing tools (marker, highlighter, tape, eraser) no longer move objects — the pen always draws, even over a card, image, or section.
- On tablet, a finger tap on an object selects it (drag still pans the canvas), so you can pick something without switching to Select.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
Tablet drawing improvements.

- **Draw with Apple Pencil only** (new setting, on by default): only the Pencil draws, highlights, tapes, and erases — your finger pans the canvas and moves/selects objects instead. Reliable palm rejection, and no more stray marks from your resting hand. Turn it off to draw with a finger too.
- **Grab objects while drawing**: press on a card, text, table, image, or a section's label to select and move it without leaving the marker.
- **Undo / redo gestures**: two-finger tap to undo, three-finger tap to redo.
- **Search bar** collapses when you dismiss the on-screen keyboard.
- Restored the reliable custom-colour button and made the settings API-compatibility fixes from the plugin review.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
Maintenance release.

- Fixes a compatibility error flagged by the plugin review: the settings "Reset" button now uses an API supported by the declared minimum Obsidian version.
- Housekeeping only — no change to drawing behavior. All tablet, Pencil, and QuickShape improvements from 0.2.0 are included.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
Big update for tablet drawing with an Apple Pencil.

- **Palm rejection**: while the Pencil is on the screen (or just lifted), stray touches from your resting hand are ignored — they can no longer cancel a stroke, add stray marks, or trigger an accidental undo.
- **Move and resize with the Pencil**: sections and nodes can now be dragged and resized with the Pencil in Select mode (previously only worked with a mouse or finger).
- **Undo is one stroke at a time**: each stroke is now its own undo step, so a single undo no longer removes two things at once.
- Under-the-hood cleanup from the plugin review: styles set through the Obsidian API, popout-window compatibility, and removal of unused code.

Includes everything from earlier: QuickShape (hold to snap a stroke into a line/circle/rectangle), ink stabilization, brush size range settings, tap-to-jump size slider, instant color picker, auto-sized text, and washi tape width control.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
New marker feature and a batch of fixes.

- **QuickShape**: draw with the marker, hold the pen still for a moment before lifting, and the stroke snaps into a straight line, circle, or rectangle. Undo restores your original hand-drawn stroke.
- **Ink stabilization setting**: a new slider smooths out hand wobble while you draw (like Procreate's Motion Filtering). Higher values give steadier lines.
- Brush size slider: tap anywhere on the track to jump there, not just drag the thumb. Smallest/biggest brush size are now separate settings, with a "Reset to defaults" button.
- Color picker opens instantly on tap (was slow before).
- New text boxes size themselves to the zoom level so they're never too small to read.
- Table tool can be turned off in settings. Table menu no longer covers the row/column drag handles.
- Removed the handwriting-to-text feature (was unreliable).
- Washi tape has a width slider and simplified color patterns.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
iPad-friendly release: fixes to how Canvas Kit's tools interact with touch and Obsidian's own canvas.

- **Freeform canvas feel while drawing**: any tool now recognizes a second finger as pan/pinch-zoom (FigJam-style), instead of fighting the active tool. Draw, write, or place with one finger; pan and zoom with two — no need to switch back to Select.
- **Undo/redo works while a tool is active**: Obsidian's built-in undo/redo buttons were being covered by the tool overlay and were unclickable while drawing — fixed. Also fixed a double-undo (one press was silently absorbing a duplicate history entry).
- **Redo no longer flashes a boxed rendering**: undone/redone ink strokes used to show Obsidian's raw padded SVG box for ~2 seconds before snapping to the frameless look. They now restyle instantly.
- **Text/table toolbar survives the iPad keyboard**: after typing text or editing a table cell, the canvas viewport is re-pinned so the on-screen keyboard can't leave the toolbar scrolled off-screen.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description: Canvas Kit 0.1.1 — FigJam-style annotation toolbar for Obsidian Canvas: drawing tools, frameless text, cards (blank / new note / existing note), sections, editable tables, and an image picker.
